title: lucuma inophylla
intro: Lucuma inophylla, also known as the lucuma tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae, native to the Andean region of South America. The medicinal properties of Lucuma inophylla include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Lucuma inophylla include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and lower cholesterol levels, as well as its potential to act as an antimicrobial agent. Lucuma inophylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used in traditional medicine and are also gaining recognition for their potential health benefits in modern medicine.
